functions.name: wfls.conway.initialize_grid
documentation: Initialize the grid with random values.

functions.name: wfls.conway.display_grid
documentation: Display the grid in the terminal.

functions.name: wfls.conway.get_neighbors
documentation: Get the number of live neighbors for a cell.

functions.name: wfls.conway.update_grid
documentation: Update the grid based on the rules of the Game of Life.

functions.name: wfls.movinf.prompt
documentation:
Prompt the user to select the search type.
The user can select between a movie, series, or episode by typing 1, 2, or 3.
User input is validated to ensure it is a number between 1 and 3.

functions.name: wfls.ui.list_results
documentation:
The codes below are used to display the list of search results.
The user is prompted to enter the number of the movie they want to see more information about.

functions.name: wfls.ui.display_details
documentation: Fetch and display detailed information for the selected item

functions.name: wfls.cli.main
documentation: Handle command-line arguments and call the appropriate functions.

functions.name: wfls.cli.greet
documentation: Returns a string that consists of a greeting to the given names in the correct format.

functions.name: wfls.cli.wc
documentation: Count the number of lines, words, and characters in a file.

functions.name: wfls.cli.ls
documentation: List the contents of a directory.

functions.name: wfls.cli.ls_from_args
documentation: Handle ls command and pass the directory path argument.

functions.name: wfls.cli.game_of_life
documentation: Start the Game of Life simulation. No arguments are required since it will be randomized.
